title: Orb of Origin Plus Old
description: Outdated, a new version has been posted separately.
body:
**Outdated, use this version: [https://modrinth.com/mod/orb-of-origin-plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/orb-of-origin-plus)**

This mod is a addon to the origins mod, the origins mod is required for the mod to work. I made the mod using MCreator.

This mod adds three items and two crafting recipes. In ancient city loot chests you can find orb of origin shells, orb of origin cores and orb of origin shards. 

By combing a orb of origin shell and orb of origin core you can make a orb of origin, by combing five orb of origin shards in a plus shape you can make a orb of origin.



Questions:

Can I use this mod in my modpacks?

Yes.

Can you make the mod support game version that isn't currently supported by the mod?

Do to MCreator being slow to update for fabric, so it is unlikely that I can.
